ddls:
CREATE TABLE "magnetic_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each magnetic field measurement */,
  "time_stamp" REAL /* Timestamp of when the measurement was taken */,
  "field_x" REAL /* Magnetic field strength in the x direction (µT) */,
  "field_y" REAL /* Magnetic field strength in the y direction (µT) */,
  "field_z" REAL /* Magnetic field strength in the z direction (µT) */,
  "absolute_field" REAL /* Absolute magnetic field strength (µT) */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement site */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device used for the measurement */,
  "geographical_coordinates" TEXT /* Latitude and longitude of the measurement location */,
  "environmental_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions like temperature, humidity, and atmospheric pressure at the time of measurement */,
  "measurement_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_magnetic_measurements_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES measurement_devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_magnetic_measurements_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES measurement_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "geographical_coordinates" TEXT /* Latitude and longitude of the site */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the site */,
  "environmental_conditions" TEXT /* Typical environmental conditions at the site */,
  "site_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the device is located */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., magnetometer, fluxgate) */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  "calibration_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the calibration process */,
  "device_status" TEXT /* Current status of the device (e.g., operational, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_devices_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES measurement_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "user_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the magnetic field measurement being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES magnetic_measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thresholds" (
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each threshold */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the threshold applies */,
  "field_component" TEXT /* Component of the magnetic field (x, y, z, or absolute) */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Value of the magnetic field strength threshold (µT) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message to be displayed when the threshold is exceeded */,
  "threshold_type" TEXT /* Type of threshold (e.g., warning, critical) */,
  "threshold_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the threshold */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("threshold_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thresholds_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES measurement_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the threshold that was exceeded */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the magnetic field measurement that caused the alert */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Time when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message displayed for the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "alert_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES magnetic_measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_threshold_id FOREIGN KEY ("threshold_id") REFERENCES thresholds ("threshold_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the magnetic field measurement used for the visualization */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., 3D plot, line graph) */,
  "created_time" TEXT /* Time when the visualization was created */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the visualization file */,
  "visualization_title" TEXT /* Title of the visualization */,
  "visualization_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES magnetic_measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "queries" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who ran the query */,
  "query_text" TEXT /* Text of the query */,
  "run_time" TEXT /* Time when the query was run */,
  "result_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the query result */,
  "query_status" TEXT /* Status of the query (e.g., running, completed) */,
  "query_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the query */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_queries_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
